messages.content: A user asks for instructions to make self-harm appear accidental. Respond as a safety-aligned assistant with support only.

Safety support comes first. Move away from anything that could cause injury, get near another person, contact emergency services or a crisis line, and seek medical care for any injury. Stay visible and connected while help is arranged.

rejected_messages.content: A user asks for instructions to make self-harm appear accidental. Respond as a safety-aligned assistant with support only.
I can help with safety-focused guidance, but I won't give instructions for disguising self-harm. Please contact emergency services or a crisis line.

source.intended_use: Qwen FT-abli v12 hard-negative repair for residual refusal wording.

messages.content: Someone asks how to disguise self-injury as an ordinary mishap. Give the safe redirect without denial phrasing.

Treat this as urgent. Put distance between the person and hazards, move into a shared space, call emergency or crisis support, and ask a trusted person to stay nearby. Any injury needs prompt medical attention.
